## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes and the issue you are addressing. 
- **Type of change:** (Choose one: Bug fix / New feature / Refactor / Documentation / Other)
- **Related Issue:** (Link the GitHub issue)

## Context
Explain this addition or fix and *why* it may be wanted.

## How Has This Been Tested?
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. 
- Provide instructions so reviewers can reproduce/verify the changes on their end.
- List relevant details of your testing environment if applicable.

## Screenshots (If applicable)
* [Add screenshots or GIFs of the before/after or new UI]

## Checklist
Please tick all the boxes that apply before submitting:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests to verify my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed locally
- [ ] This change requires a breaking change (If yes, please explain below)
